fields.title: Authorize agent spawns from Ralph loop agent contract
fields.description: The agent tool must use the current Ralph loop's pinned agent contract when invoked from a Ralph-owned session, so spawn availability is reproducible and not controlled by ambient project settings.
fields.design: Refactor agent enablement resolution so AgentControl can resolve the effective agent scope from the parent session file. For Ralph-owned sessions, load the owning loop state and use capabilityContract.agents.enabled as the authoritative allowlist. For normal sessions, keep the existing project/session settings behavior. Refresh the agent tool description from the same scoped source so the LLM sees only the available agents for the current session.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Spawning a disabled-by-Ralph-contract agent fails with a scoped error listing enabled Ralph agents, spawning an enabled agent succeeds even if project settings later change, normal-session agent spawning keeps existing behavior, and the agent tool description reflects the active Ralph loop allowlist.
